Organized Events & Conferences

Conferences

  • Program Committee Member, Quantum AI 2026 conference in Indianapolis, Indiana, USA (August 14-16, 2026, Website: https://qnlp.ai/, LinkedIn post: LinkedIn Event.

Selected Academic Schools

  • Co-organizer of the Cairo University Spring School in Quantum Technologies, April-May 2026, held online. Website: https://quantum.cu.edu.eg/, LinkedIn post: LinkedIn Event, School’s flyer.

Selected Workshops

  • Co-organized the three versions of Introduction to Quantum Computing, within the Amsterdam Quantum Talent and Learning Center (QTLC), Amsterdam University of Applied Sciences, hybrid event, held in four locations in the Netherlands (Fontys, Saxion, Eindhoven, and Amsterdam) and online:
    • 2026: LinkedIn post, Workshop flyer
    • 2025: Check QTLC Website
    • 2024: Check QTLC website

Quantum AI Hackathons
